description:
A cognitive neuroscience lab needs a PsychoPy Builder experiment for an adaptive n-back working memory study (Kirchner, 1958). Participants must respond when the current stimulus matches the one presented n positions back. Implement an adaptive difficulty mechanism starting at n=2 that increases n if accuracy is greater than 85% on the last 10 trials and decreases n if accuracy is less than 55%. This adaptive version is used in clinical populations to maintain the task within the individual's zone of proximal development.

Create the PsychoPy Builder experiment and a conditions file according to these specifications:
- Stimulus sequence: Consonants only (B, C, D, F, G, H, J, K, L, M, N, P, Q,
